lastReleaseMessage: chore(htbh): add notify_property_list_changed to source-reference guard allowlist

barRaise.topFinding: Healthiest HBH has looked in many cycles. The 2026-06-23 HIGH (the uncommitted v0.99.0-v0.99.2 stack) closed: v0.99.3 through v0.99.10 all landed and pushed, git fsck runs clean, and the GDD pill, project.godot, and HEAD all reconcile at v0.99.10. The headline is the best-practices-parity initiative completing - world_3d.gd went from a ~1260-line god object to an 800-line coordinator with six injected subsystems (defense_system, economy_system, unit_controller, wave_director, draft_controller, world_builder, split out in v0.99.3), constants centralized (the long-open S-39 closed for the 3D stack), and subsystem records typed as RefCounted - the exact next-architecture target the last review named. The Erik-Lookdev branch reconciled cleanly, landing the nav-test pass plus the first 3D zombie enemy art. No HIGH findings this cycle. The two MEDs left are doc-drift cleanups, not bugs: ARCHITECTURE.md still bills itself as the 'code source of truth' off a v0.80.1 2D snapshot the decomposition has now fully obsoleted, and there is still no world_3d/crowd3d profiler baseline at 1000-3000 enemies before gameplay drives the 3D crowd.

actions.title: Refresh docs/ARCHITECTURE.md against the post-decomposition 3D stack or retire it and point at BEST_PRACTICES_PARITY.md; git-rm the orphaned source/vfx/damage_number.gd(.uid).
Capture and log a world_3d / crowd3d 1000-3000-enemy profiler run in docs/OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md before gameplay drives the 3D crowd.
Trim the stale GDD tile-constant-drift note (GDD:4816) off the retired files; S-39 is now closed for the 3D stack.
Commit the uncommitted docs/GDD.html file-map edit with the next release.
Run the deferred defense-balance reconciliation when balance tuning next opens.
Repoint or relabel the dashboard zero roster metrics at the 3D roster counts.
Gitignore outputs/bar_raise_*.py and git-rm the tracked copies, or accept them as a kept generator log.
